answer: The top 5 outliers in mixed beverage gross receipts this year are Chili's Grill & Bar with $1,197,702,659, Hospitality International, Inc. with $766,985,094, Texas Roadhouse with $691,260,239, Pappadeaux Seafood Kitchen with $549,846,549, and Applebee's Neighborhood Grill & Bar with $537,201,057. These establishments represent the highest grossing locations in the dataset.
